title: RFTools Utility
description: General RFTools blocks that don't fit in a more specific category
body:
# RFTools Utility

RFTools Utility is the 1.14+ version of the original [RFTools](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools) with tons of general tools and utilities. This mod is intended to be used together with [RFTools Power](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-power) and depends on [RFTools Base](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-base) and [McJtyLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcjtylib).

It contains the following blocks and tools:
- Automatic crafter
- Environmental controller
- Logic blocks
- Information screens
- Spawner system
- Multitank
- Teleportation system

![RFTools Utility blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7n3HbHSE/images/767a375e729c17ace4316cee60c0680ee1e932bb.png)

## Modpacks
Feel free to use this mod in any modpack!
